title: ReCrafted
description: Minecraft is boring. Let's make it fun.
body:
# ReCrafted
### by thesomewhatyou

Minecraft. Re-imagined. Re-polished. Re-vitalized.

## What is TR?

TR is the answer to the question: "What if Minecraft looked as good as it feels?"

We have made the game more *stylistic* and cute, like the trailers. Everything comes to life, with emotion, the wonderful food, and more! 

Whether you are an avid miner looking for scenery, or a muncher wanting some good food, this is (probably) for you.

### Eye Candy is Cool

Immersion is everything. So? Make it better. Minecraft fails to achieve this Vanilla wise, but here. Immersion.

It comes with shaders. Of course, at a cost.

## Rough Overview

**Alive World**: Mobs are even crisper, with proper emotion and life.

**Particle Overhaul**: Every block break, potion splash, and rain droplet looks crisp and satisfying via Visuality.

**Soundscapes**: An immersive audio overhaul adds ambient nature sounds.

**Dark Loading Screen**: This is cool. 

## The Details

### The "Goodies" (Gameplay Features)
It’s not just about looks; it’s about how it plays. We've added quality-of-life features and "Vanilla+" content that feels like it belongs in the base game.

### World Gen Expanded: Discover new biomes and revamped structures that make exploration rewarding again using Terralith.

"that's it?"

yuh :P


### Performance should be cool. 

That's why the texture packs automatically make it cooler; even without shaders. With shaders, it's an even cooler experience.

Now go on, install this modpack, experience gameplay galore! 

This modpack is protected by Do What The F*ck You Want To Public License, which is practically self-explantory.

If you really can't fathom it, just read.

> 0. You just DO WHAT THE FUCK YOU WANT TO.

Yes. It's that simple.
